name: TotalAV
tagline: Best value antivirus with excellent system optimization
description: TotalAV offers an impressive combination of solid malware protection and powerful system optimization tools at a very competitive price point.
longDescription: TotalAV has rapidly climbed the rankings by offering strong antivirus protection and an excellent system optimization toolkit at a price that undercuts most competitors. In our malware tests, TotalAV detected 98.7% of threats — slightly behind Bitdefender and Norton, but well above the industry average. Where TotalAV truly excels is system optimization. The included disk cleaner, browser cleanup, and startup manager are genuinely useful tools that noticeably improve PC performance. The interface is clean, modern, and easy to navigate, making it particularly suitable for less technical users.
pros: Includes VPN with unlimited data on premium plan
cons: Slightly lower malware detection than top competitors
Phone support limited to business hours

keyFeatures.name: System Tune-Up
keyFeatures.description: Disk cleaner removes junk files, browser cache, and duplicate files. Startup manager identifies and disables unnecessary boot programs.

keyFeatures.name: Web Shield
keyFeatures.description: Real-time URL filtering that blocks access to malicious websites, phishing pages, and scam sites before they load.

keyFeatures.name: Data Breach Monitor
keyFeatures.description: Monitors your email address against known data breaches. Alerts you if your credentials have been compromised.

keyFeatures.name: Cloud Scanning
keyFeatures.description: Upload suspicious files to TotalAV's cloud for deep analysis without using local system resources.

verdict: TotalAV is the best value pick for users who want solid protection plus genuinely useful system optimization tools. While it doesn't quite match Bitdefender in pure detection rates, the combination of good security, excellent PC cleanup tools, and competitive pricing makes it our recommended budget choice.

faqs.question: Is TotalAV legit and safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, TotalAV is a legitimate antivirus product that has been independently tested by AV-Test and AV-Comparatives. It uses the Avira antivirus engine for its core malware detection. The company is based in the UK and has been in business since 2016.

faqs.question: What is TotalAV's refund policy?
faqs.answer: TotalAV offers a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days. Note that the guarantee only applies to the first purchase.

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has been evaluating cybersecurity products for 7 years.

seoMeta.title: TotalAV Review 2026: 9.1/10 Rating | TrueTopReviews
